summary: Frontend retest after admin nav + Directory debounce + ChatWidget fixes. All 6 requested behaviors verified via Playwright against public URL.
verified_behaviors: Admin login with soumyaranjansrb9@gmail.com / Srb123@# redirects to /admin (PASS)

Sidebar NavLinks are absolute paths; click sequence /admin -> tools -> categories -> packs -> users -> admins -> dashboard -> packs -> tools all produce correct /admin/<section> URLs with NO chaining (PASS all 8 clicks)
data-testid admin-nav-packs (and dashboard, tools, categories, users, admins) present on sidebar
Directory /tools live-filters as user types: URL param q=chatgpt appears ~300ms after typing (not immediately at 100ms); result count updates from '0 tools found' to '1 tool found'
ChatWidget positioned at bottom:96px right:24px (bottom-24 right-6); Emergent badge at bottom:16px right:16px height 40px -> widget sits ~40px above badge, no overlap
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard nav-link works but is_visible returned False during check (still navigable). Minor - likely due to timing of active-class re-render; not blocking.
Recharts logs width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on Admin Dashboard when container has 0 dims briefly - cosmetic console warning only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin routing regression validated. If further nav changes made, re-run same 8-click sequence.
